tasks.label: C++: build & run (debug checks)
args: g++-15 -std=c++17 -g -O1 -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -Wall -Wextra Main.cpp -o Main_cpp && { timeout 10 ./Main_cpp; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 124 ] && echo "[TIMEOUT 10s: program khatam nahi hua - infinite loop?]" >&2; exit $rc; }
tasks.detail: g++-15 + libstdc++ debug mode (out-of-bounds / bad-iterator errors terminal pe). inputf.in -> outputf.in via freopen.

tasks.label: C++: build & run (fast -O2)
args: g++-15 -std=c++17 -O2 -Wall -Wextra Main.cpp -o Main_cpp && { timeout 10 ./Main_cpp; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 124 ] && echo "[TIMEOUT 10s: program khatam nahi hua - infinite loop?]" >&2; exit $rc; }
tasks.detail: Fast -O2 build (no debug checks) - speed / large-input testing ke liye.
